item.title: News Regarding the Health Effects of the Olympics
item.description: Hello everyone, here are some news about the health effects of the 2008 Beijing Olympic Games. N-IUSSP (International Union for the Scientific Study of Population) Olympic Games help children grow up healthy Blog of British Journal of Sports Medicine What is the association between Olympic Games and children’s growth? Looking at evidence from China News Website of Peking University Association between Olympic Games and children’s growth

item.title: Self-introduction
item.description: Hello everyone, welcome to my website! I am Xiyuan Hu. My research interests focus on health and gender. Interests Travelling Reading Watching Movie/Drama

item.title: Experiences
item.description: Education Sep 2023 - Present, Ph.D. student in Population Health, Department of Population Health Sciences, School of Medicine and Public Health, University of Wisconsin-Madison (UW-Madison) Sep 2020 - Jul 2023, Master in Gerontology, Institute of Population Research, Peking University (PKU) Sep 2016 - Jun 2020, Bachelor in Public Affairs Administration, School of Sociology & Demography, Renmin University of China (RUC) Research Experiences PI: Dr. Silvia Barcellos • 2026 - Present

item.title: Home
item.description: Hello everyone, welcome to my website! I am currently a Ph.D. student in the Department of Population Health Sciences at the School of Medicine and Public Health, University of Wisconsin-Madison. Research interests Public Health Genomics Population Health Links Google Scholar | ORCID ID | X(Twitter) Visitors

item.title: Research
item.description: Research Papers in Peer-Reviewed Publications (*: correspondent author, +: co-first author) In English • Mariétou Ouayogodé* & Xiyuan Hu. (2026). Rural-Urban Disparities in Diabetes Quality of Care with Accountable Care Organization Participation. The Journal of Rural Health, 42:e70121. doi. • Xiyuan Hu & Mariétou Ouayogodé*. (2024). Association and Variation Between the COVID-19 Pandemic and Health Care Quality in the Medicare Shared Savings Program: Insights From a Seven-Year Natural Experiment. Journal of Public Health Management and Practice, 10–1097.
